adminType.description: The type of administrator. Possible values are 1 for system administrator, 2 for domain administrator, and 3 for limited administrator.

authenticationMethod.description: The administrator's authentication method. Possible values are 0 for Symantec Endpoint Protection Manager Authentication, 1 for RSA SecurID Authentication, and 2 for Directory Authentication.

lockAccount.description: Whether the administrator's account is configured to lock after a specified number of logon failures.

lockTimeThreshold.description: The amount of time the administrator's account is locked after a logon failure.

loginAttemptThreshold.description: The number of logon failures allowed before the administrator's account is locked.

notifyAdminOfLockedState.description: Whether to notify the administrator that the account is locked due to logon failures.

reportingRights.description: The administrator's reporting rights. Not currently used.

lockAccount.description: Whether the administrator's account is configured to lock after a specified number of logon failures.

lockTimeThreshold.description: The amount of time the administrator's account is locked after a logon failure.

loginAttemptThreshold.description: The number of logon failures allowed before the administrator's account is locked.

notifyAdminOfLockedState.description: Whether to notify the administrator that the account is locked due to logon failures.

adminType.description: The type of administrator. Possible values are 1 for system administrator, 2 for domain administrator, and 3 for limited administrator.

attemptThreshold.description: The number of logon failures allowed before the administrator's account is locked.

authenticationMethod.description: The administrator's authentication method. Possible values are 0 for Symantec Endpoint Protection Manager Authentication, 1 for RSA SecurID Authentication, and 2 for Directory Authentication.

creationTime.description: When the administrator account was created.

enabled.description: Whether the administrator is enabled or not.

failedLoginCount.description: The number of times the administrator's logon has failed.

lastLogonIP.description: The administrator's last logon IP address.

lastPasswordChanged.description: When the administrator's password was last changed.

lockAccount.description: Whether the administrator's account is configured to lock after a specified number of logon failures.

lockStatus.description: Whether the administrator is locked or not.

lockTimeThreshold.description: The amount of time the administrator's account is locked after a logon failure.

notifyAdminOfLockedState.description: Whether to notify the administrator that the account is locked due to logon failures.

onlineStatus.description: Whether the administrator is online or offline.

enable.description: Specify whether directory server integration sync is enable or disable. Possible values are true and false.

reuse_history.description: The number of passwords to remember

reuse_span_days.description: How long (in days) before a password can be reused

address.description: The address(either ip or name)\instanceName (if exists)

database.description: The database name SEPM is using

dbTLSRootCertificate.description: root X.509 certificate of the SEPM database TLS connection in PEM format

dbUser.description: The database user SEPM is login as)

installedBySepm.description: If the database was installed by SEPM

name.description: The logic name of the database in sepm

port.description: The TCP port of the database

groupRights.description: Specifies whether or not the user has group rights.

policyRights.description: Specifies whether or not the user has policy rights.

remoteCommandRights.description: Specifies whether or not the user has the rights to send commands to clients.

reportingRights.description: Specifies whether or not the user has reporting rights.

siteRights.description: Specifies whether or not the user has site rights.

bitMask.description: The user role mask for the web user interface. Possible values are 8 for system administrator, 4 for domain administrator, and 2 for limited administrator.

UserRole.description: User role model for the webUI login

bannerText.description: The banner text associated with the domain.

bannerTitle.description: The banner title associated with the domain.

clientId.description: The client id associated with the application.

clientSecret.description: The client secret associated with the application.

domain.description: The Symantec Endpoint Protection Manager domain to which the username logs on.

refreshTokenExpiration.description: Refresh token expiration value in seconds.

token.description: The access token associated with the user.

tokenExpiration.description: The access token expiration value in seconds.

username.description: The username used to log on to Symantec Endpoint Protection Manager.

info.description: This page documents the REST APIs that perform Symantec Endpoint Protection Manager operations.
info.title: Symantec Endpoint Protection Manager API Reference

parameters.name: domain
